dashboard.title: Your Lineage
dashboard.subtitleEmpty: Begin your journey into the past by documenting your family's unique story.
dashboard.subtitleCount: {count, plural, one {Overseeing # legacy across generations.} other {Overseeing # legacies across generations.}}
dashboard.emptyDescription: Every great history starts with a single name. Create your first family tree to begin.
dashboard.defaultDescription: A documented history of the family lineage and descendants.

createTree.title: New Family Tree
createTree.description: Enter the details of the lineage you wish to document.
createTree.descriptionPlaceholder: A brief history of this branch...
createTree.successToast: Your new lineage has been established

editTree.title: Amend Records
editTree.description: Update the title and historical context of this lineage.
editTree.descriptionPlaceholder: A brief history of this branch...

deleteTree.confirm: Are you sure you want to remove this lineage from the records?

deletePersonButton.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this person?

personSidebar.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? This cannot be undone.

hero.label: Genealogy
hero.description: Map the generations. Preserve the stories.
hero.descriptionEm: Connect who you are to where you came from.

items.title: Visual Tree Builder
items.body: Drag and drop to place ancestors, partners, and descendants. Every relationship rendered with clarity on an infinite canvas.

items.title: Portraits & Stories
items.body: Attach photographs, birth places, and life narratives to each person. Preserve what documents cannot: the texture of a life.

items.title: Export & Share
items.body: Download portrait cards as high-resolution prints. Share your completed tree with family across generations.

steps.title: Create your tree
steps.body: Name your family tree and place yourself at the center. Your story begins with a single person.

steps.title: Add relatives
steps.body: Drag handles to add parents, siblings, partners, and children. Fill in dates, places, and photographs.

steps.title: Share & preserve
steps.body: Export beautiful portrait cards for print, or share your tree link with family members worldwide.

quote.text: In every conceivable manner, the family is link to our past, bridge to our future.
quote.author: Alex Haley

cta.label: Begin today
cta.title: Your story
cta.body: Thousands of ancestors wait to be remembered. Your tree begins with a single name.
